purpose: SIGMOD/VLDB submission feasibility gate, not final paper evidence
query_selection: Within every selected cell, rank eligible queries by SHA-256(seed|suite|case_id|query_index) before any solver runs.
small_g_probe_guardrail: contender <= 1.2 * baseline OR contender <= baseline + 0.05 seconds; raw ratios remain reported
breadth_strata: A: DBLP-AMiner and IMDb at f=400, g in {4,8,12,16}, plus g=10 at the f-range endpoints {100,3200}
B: all six SNAP graphs, MovieLens-32M and Toronto-current at g in {4,12}; four representative sources also at g=16
C: DBpedia at g in {1,4,8,10,11,12} and LinkedMDB at g in {1,4,8,9,12}
secondary: one fixed A, B and C ablation cell
fixed_depth_strata: A: DBLP-AMiner and IMDb at g=16,f=400
B: every one of the eight datasets at g=16
C: DBpedia g in {10,12} and LinkedMDB g in {9,12}
fixed_depth_shortfall_note: LinkedMDB g=12 has only one natural source-query mapping, so it contributes breadth but no distinct rank-2 depth query.
adaptive_policy: Only after breadth: follow up cells where Safe solves but ABHSS times out, or Safe is at least 2x faster than the best ABHSS. These samples are diagnostic and excluded from unbiased claim estimates.
